name: list_boards
description: Retrieve a list of all boards the authenticated user has access to. You can filter by board kind (public, private, share), limit results, and paginate. Returns board ID, name, description, state, and permissions. This is a GraphQL query sent as a POST request.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL query string to fetch boards.
parameters.example: { boards (limit: 10) { id name description state board_kind } }

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of boards to return (used inside the GraphQL query).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (used inside the GraphQL query, 1-based).

parameters.name: board_kind
parameters.description: Filter by board kind: 'public', 'private', or 'share' (used inside the GraphQL query).

body.query: { boards (limit: 10, page: 1) { id name description state board_kind owner { id name } } }
